name: Workbench Access
notes: Editorial access control by content section. The core config entity type is `access_scheme` (config prefix `workbench_access.access_scheme.<id>`; config_export keys id, label, plural_label, scheme, scheme_settings). The `scheme` key names an AccessControlHierarchy plugin (Plugin/AccessControlHierarchy) — two ship in-module: `taxonomy` (sections from a vocabulary) and `menu` (sections from a menu tree). `scheme_settings` is validated per-plugin (taxonomy: vocabularies + fields; menu: menus + bundles). admin_permission for the entity is `administer workbench access`. Submodule workbench_access_hooks is a hidden test-only module demonstrating hook_workbench_access_scheme_update_alter().
